title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Alex Hormozi uses AI across his businesses through a 4-pillar system: treating data as a competitive moat, prioritizing voice before AI implementation, decomposing workflows, and leveraging compound effects. The video highlights a company-wide mistake that required CEO intervention.
